summary: Across the year, focused on a SaaS crypto trading platform, AI/LLM tools, and hardware emulation firmware. Also built utilities for Windows Explorer, computer vision, and automation.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Continued development on the AI-driven algorithmic trading platform for cryptocurrencies.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Worked on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3.

items.title: Profile README and CV generator
items.description: Iterated on the automated GitHub profile with CV timeline and activity charts.

items.title: Profile card generator
items.description: Maintained the custom profile card SVG generator with light/dark theme support.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Experimented with machine learning models for cryptocurrency price forecasting.

items.title: Computer vision for poker
items.description: Developed computer vision tools for online poker platforms.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Built and refined custom trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot.

items.title: Clash proxy fork
items.description: Maintained a fork of Clash.Meta with custom API support for FlClash.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging
items.description: Built a new version of the file and folder tagging utility for Windows Explorer.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant
items.description: Developed an Android app with LLM capabilities for phone use.

items.title: CV and input emulation research
items.description: Worked on computer vision, mouse/keyboard emulation, and screen capture experiments.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built a multi-session autonomous coding assistant using AI.

items.title: Telegram n8n automation node
items.description: Maintained a fork of the TelePilot n8n node, focusing on stability and new triggers.

items.title: Windows Explorer tagging utility
items.description: Polished the original file tagging tool for Windows Explorer, preparing v2 release.

items.title: Neovim development environment
items.description: Maintained a custom Neovim configuration with IDE features and remote clipboard support.

items.title: YOLO annotation tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, fast YOLO labeling tool for personal computer vision projects.

items.title: Telegram n8n node stabilization
items.description: Stabilized the forked TelePilot n8n node with session handling and deployment setup.

items.title: Windows Explorer tagging v2 prep
items.description: Prepared the Windows Explorer tagging tool for v2 release with Microsoft Store submission.

items.title: Crypto trading platform
items.description: Continued development on the SaaS crypto algo trading platform.

items.title: Crypto trading platform
items.description: Ongoing work on the AI-driven cryptocurrency trading platform.

items.title: HID firmware maintenance
items.description: Maintained the ESP32-S3 mouse and keyboard emulation firmware.

items.title: Telegram n8n node fork
items.description: Initial fork and setup of the TelePilot n8n node with Docker deployment.

items.title: Profile README updates
items.description: Updated the GitHub profile README with notes and activity tracking.
